V-M-001.COMMANDS: pass-local 2026-06-04: Settings refresh-token default is guarded at 60 days alongside existing backend security tests

V-M-002.COMMANDS: pass-local 2026-06-01: Phase-45 backend suite proves verified-email onboarding creates pending trial access instead of a running countdown

V-M-003.COMMANDS: pass-local 2026-06-05: Phase-70 and Phase-73 smokes prove VPN/AWG config payload unchanged and AmneziaVPN QR not advertised without proof

V-M-004.COMMANDS: pass-local 2026-06-04: Phase-69 backend suite covers referral active extension, pending referral bonus grant, paid-subscription transfer, and duplicate processing idempotency

V-M-005.COMMANDS: pass-local 2026-06-04: Phase-69 referral tests prove one-time first-payment bonus, active extension, pending first-VPN bonus, and masked invite identity

V-M-006.COMMANDS: pass-local 2026-06-05: Phase-75 used existing admin API only; backend/admin diff guard is clean and Phase-75 smoke proved PROTECTED_ADMIN_API_UNCHANGED

V-M-008.COMMANDS: pass-local 2026-06-04: Phase-69 scheduler tests prove activate_pending_trials handles pending referral bonus from VPN handshake without trial conversion

Phase-68-Verification.NAME: User Dashboard Subscription Merge Verification
Phase-68-Verification.verification-docs: docs/verification/V-M-075.xml docs/verification/V-M-036.xml docs/verification/V-M-045.xml docs/verification/V-M-063.xml docs/verification/V-M-068.xml docs/verification/V-M-071.xml docs/verification/V-M-074.xml docs/verification/V-M-077.xml docs/verification/V-M-080.xml docs/verification/V-M-009.xml
Phase-68-Verification.planned-tests: scripts/phase68-dashboard-subscription-smoke.mjs plus frontend/admin builds, Phase-45/46/50/53/57/58/60/61/62/63/67 regression smokes, git diff --check, MyGRACE lint through Phase-60, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guards.
Phase-68-Verification.acceptance: PASS local: Dashboard removes bulky sections, shows MTProto first, embeds subscription below it, keeps canonical tariffs, compact calendar, responsive no-overlap, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard.

Phase-69-Verification.NAME: Referral Bonus Activation Verification
Phase-69-Verification.verification-docs: docs/verification/V-M-005.xml docs/verification/V-M-004.xml docs/verification/V-M-063.xml docs/verification/V-M-008.xml docs/verification/V-M-009.xml docs/verification/V-M-036.xml docs/verification/V-M-075.xml docs/verification/V-M-028.xml docs/verification/V-M-041.xml
Phase-69-Verification.planned-tests: backend referral, billing, trial activation, scheduler, migration, verified-registration tests plus scripts/phase69-referral-bonus-smoke.mjs.
Phase-69-Verification.acceptance: Paid referral gives exactly one 7-day inviter reward, extends active subscriptions, creates pending first-VPN activation when inviter has no active subscription, and shows masked referred email only.

Phase-70-Verification.NAME: VPN QR Parity and Config Page Compaction Verification
Phase-70-Verification.verification-docs: docs/verification/V-M-003.xml docs/verification/V-M-022.xml docs/verification/V-M-066.xml docs/verification/V-M-075.xml docs/verification/V-M-036.xml docs/verification/V-M-009.xml docs/verification/V-M-071.xml
Phase-70-Verification.planned-tests: backend VPN/router/manual-client tests, Phase-48 MIME smoke, scripts/phase70-config-qr-parity-smoke.mjs, frontend build, Phase-57/62 regressions, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, and protected deploy/runtime guard.
Phase-70-Verification.acceptance: PASS local: QR payload source matches API/download/frontend config text, config diagnostics/raw-config blocks remain removed, .conf MIME behavior remains Android/iOS-safe, and deploy/create-client.sh is untouched.

Phase-71-Verification.NAME: Device Config Retrieval API and Config Page Master-Detail UX Verification
Phase-71-Verification.verification-docs: docs/verification/V-M-022.xml docs/verification/V-M-066.xml docs/verification/V-M-075.xml docs/verification/V-M-036.xml docs/verification/V-M-063.xml docs/verification/V-M-071.xml docs/verification/V-M-077.xml docs/verification/V-M-080.xml docs/verification/V-M-009.xml docs/verification/V-M-074.xml
Phase-71-Verification.planned-tests: backend device/vpn/trial tests, frontend build, scripts/phase71-device-config-master-detail-smoke.mjs, Phase-57/59/61/62/70 regressions, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected deploy/runtime guard.
Phase-71-Verification.acceptance: PASS local: existing active devices are selectable and exportable through QR/.conf/Copy without rotation; mobile/desktop config UX is compact; requested logo, QR close, calendar, logout, copy, label, and i18n fixes are verified; deploy/install surfaces remain untouched.

Phase-72-Verification.NAME: User Auth and Cabinet Navigation Polish Verification
Phase-72-Verification.verification-docs: docs/verification/V-M-009.xml docs/verification/V-M-036.xml docs/verification/V-M-063.xml docs/verification/V-M-071.xml docs/verification/V-M-074.xml docs/verification/V-M-075.xml docs/verification/V-M-077.xml
Phase-72-Verification.planned-tests: cd frontend && npm run build; cd frontend-admin && npm run build; node scripts/phase72-user-auth-navigation-smoke.mjs; node scripts/session-security-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase57-premium-user-cabinet-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase59-motion-interactions-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase61-responsive-adaptation-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase68-dashboard-subscription-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase71-device-config-master-detail-smoke.mjs; XML parse; MyGRACE lint; git diff --check; protected admin/backend/deploy/runtime guard.
Phase-72-Verification.acceptance: PASS local: user /login maps invalid credentials to "Неверный логин или пароль"; desktop logout sits under Настройки; mobile bottom navigation is reachable without overlap; desktop subscription calendar is compact; Settings language controls are removed; admin/backend/deploy/runtime surfaces remain untouched.

Phase-73-Verification.NAME: User Config Page and Amnezia QR Correctness Verification
Phase-73-Verification.verification-docs: docs/verification/V-M-003.xml docs/verification/V-M-022.xml docs/verification/V-M-036.xml docs/verification/V-M-063.xml docs/verification/V-M-066.xml docs/verification/V-M-068.xml docs/verification/V-M-071.xml docs/verification/V-M-075.xml
Phase-73-Verification.planned-tests: cd frontend && npm run build; node scripts/phase73-config-amnezia-qr-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase48-config-download-mime-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase57-premium-user-cabinet-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase61-responsive-adaptation-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase70-config-qr-parity-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase71-device-config-master-detail-smoke.mjs; backend device/vpn/trial tests skipped because API shape did not change; XML parse; MyGRACE lint; git diff --check; protected deploy/create-client/runtime/admin guard.
Phase-73-Verification.acceptance: PASS local: /dashboard/config uses "KPN Конфигурация", removes the selected-device helper sentence, does not advertise a non-working AmneziaVPN QR, points AmneziaVPN users to .conf import, preserves AmneziaWG QR/.conf/Copy payload parity, and shows tariff-aware device-limit exhaustion without changing billing/VPN/deploy/runtime semantics.

Phase-74-Verification.NAME: Admin Shell Navigation Login and Scroll Fixes Verification
Phase-74-Verification.verification-docs: docs/verification/V-M-010.xml docs/verification/V-M-037.xml docs/verification/V-M-068.xml docs/verification/V-M-071.xml docs/verification/V-M-074.xml docs/verification/V-M-076.xml docs/verification/V-M-077.xml
Phase-74-Verification.planned-tests: cd frontend-admin && npm run build; node scripts/phase74-admin-shell-navigation-smoke.mjs passed; remaining Phase-54/58/59/61/62 plus Phase-50/68 regressions, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected guard are part of final verification run.
Phase-74-Verification.acceptance: PASS local: admin login text never overlaps icons; visible admin Tariffs/Plans UI is removed only from admin; direct /plans is safe redirect; Logout sits under Nodes; content-area wheel scrolling and bounded rail geometry are verified; backend canonical tariffs, user tariff purchase UI, deploy/install, nginx, docker-compose, VPN runtime, and MTProto runtime remain unchanged.

Phase-75-Verification.NAME: Admin Users and Devices Unified Inventory Verification
Phase-75-Verification.verification-docs: docs/verification/V-M-006.xml docs/verification/V-M-010.xml docs/verification/V-M-024.xml docs/verification/V-M-037.xml docs/verification/V-M-074.xml docs/verification/V-M-076.xml docs/verification/V-M-077.xml
Phase-75-Verification.planned-tests: cd frontend-admin && npm run build; node scripts/phase75-admin-users-devices-smoke.mjs; Phase-54/58/59/61/62/74 regressions, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected deploy/install/nginx/docker-compose/VPN/MTProto runtime/user frontend guard are part of final verification run; backend admin auth/device tests skipped because backend admin API files are unchanged.
Phase-75-Verification.acceptance: PASS local: /users is the single admin account/device inventory; visible /devices nav is removed; direct /devices redirects safely to /users; expanded users show bounded device rows; block/unblock/rotate/revoke actions stay confirmation-safe; deploy/install/runtime/user frontend and backend API surfaces remain untouched.

Phase-76-Verification.NAME: Consolidated Frontend Polish Gate Verification
Phase-76-Verification.verification-docs: docs/verification/V-M-009.xml docs/verification/V-M-010.xml docs/verification/V-M-036.xml docs/verification/V-M-037.xml docs/verification/V-M-063.xml docs/verification/V-M-066.xml docs/verification/V-M-068.xml docs/verification/V-M-071.xml docs/verification/V-M-074.xml docs/verification/V-M-075.xml docs/verification/V-M-076.xml docs/verification/V-M-077.xml
Phase-76-Verification.planned-tests: cd frontend && npm run build; cd frontend-admin && npm run build; node scripts/phase72-user-auth-navigation-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase73-config-amnezia-qr-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase74-admin-shell-navigation-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase75-admin-users-devices-smoke.mjs; user regressions Phase-57/61/68/70/71; admin regressions Phase-54/58/59/62; backend targeted tests only if API/backend diff exists; XML parse; MyGRACE lint; git diff --check; protected deploy/runtime guard.
Phase-76-Verification.acceptance: PASS local: Phase-72 through Phase-75 user/admin polish is verified together, older user/admin regressions still pass, backend API tests are run only if API shape changed, protected deploy/runtime surfaces are clean, and the project is ready for release decision.
Phase-76-Verification.evidence: PASS local: user/admin builds passed; Phase-72/73/74/75 smokes passed; Phase-57/61/68/70/71 user regressions passed; Phase-54/58/59/62 admin regressions passed; backend/API diff was empty so backend targeted tests were skipped by contract; XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected deploy/runtime guard passed.
